name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Just a gentle check-in before the day gets going. Yesterday brought a few new faces our way and some appointments on the books — nothing that needs your attention right this second, just wanted you to have the lay of the land with your coffee.

Everything's running smoothly on our end. If anything needs a closer look, it'll be waiting for you in the dashboard whenever you're ready.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
